drl:
rule "R0"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    ( $p0_0 : T0(f1 != 3, f0 < 0.0) )
    or
    ( $p0_0 : T0(f1 != 3, f0 < 0.0) )
then
    delete($p0_0);
end
rule "R1"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    (or $p1_0 : T1() $p1_0 : T1() $p1_0 : T1())
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    delete($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
salience($b2_0_1)
when
    T0(f1 >= -2, f1 < 0, $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0)
    accumulate( T1(f0 <= $b2_0_1); $a2_1 : count() )
    T0()
then
end
rule "R3"
salience -4
when
    accumulate( T1(f0 in (-2.5)); $a3_0 : count() )
then
end
rule "R4"
salience 7
when
    accumulate( T0(f1 == 0, $s4_0 : f1); $a4_0 : sum($s4_0) )
then
    insert(new T1(0.5));
end
rule "R5"
when
    T0(f1 < -1, !(f1 != 1 || f0 in (3, 2.0, 2)), f1 * f1 > -2, $b5_0_0 : f0)
    T1(f0 != 2, f0 > 8, f0 <= $b5_0_0, $b5_1_0 : f0)
    T0($b5_2_0 : f1, $b5_2_1 : f0)
then
end
